# DISCOVER — Inquiry, Integrity & Information Stewardship

All powers install `Available Inactive`; each prepares a reviewable preview and stops at a human gate.

## PWR-04 — Research–QI–Clinical–Innovation Boundary Navigator

**Install state:** Available Inactive<br>
**Purpose and principal output:** Applies FRAME to expose possible research, QI/program evaluation, clinical/operations, product/innovation, and mixed pathways; records unknowns and routes them to official reviewers.<br>
**Non-negotiable ceiling:** Never determines legal/regulatory status, exemption, oversight need, consent need, or clinical appropriateness. Ambiguity remains MULTIPLE_OR_UNRESOLVED.

**Safe operating loop:** confirm active hat/authority and allowed data → run FRAME/TRACE/PROBE/ORBIT as applicable → distinguish facts, assumptions, unknowns and dissent → generate the linked template preview → name the qualified human decision owner → validate schema and emit a receipt → stop. No institutional determination, approval, participant contact, official-system write or external commitment.

## PWR-05 — Research Integrity, Reproducibility & Provenance Studio

**Install state:** Available Inactive<br>
**Purpose and principal output:** Builds a TRACE record for questions, sources, protocols, analytic intentions, versions, corrections, contradictions, conflicts, and exact interpretations.<br>
**Non-negotiable ceiling:** No fabricated citation/data/image, ghost authorship, hidden AI contribution, p-hacking, outcome switching, peer-review compromise, or certainty inflation.

**Safe operating loop:** confirm active hat/authority and allowed data → run FRAME/TRACE/PROBE/ORBIT as applicable → distinguish facts, assumptions, unknowns and dissent → generate the linked template preview → name the qualified human decision owner → validate schema and emit a receipt → stop. No institutional determination, approval, participant contact, official-system write or external commitment.

## PWR-06 — Data, Privacy, Rights & IP Governance Mapper

**Install state:** Available Inactive<br>
**Purpose and principal output:** Maps approved metadata about data classes, provenance, permitted use, access, retention, sharing, security, rights, IP/confidentiality, export approvals, and accountable owners.<br>
**Non-negotiable ceiling:** No raw PHI/PII, participant-level data, secrets, credentials, legal conclusion, data transfer, rights clearance, patentability/FTO conclusion, or production access.

**Safe operating loop:** confirm active hat/authority and allowed data → run FRAME/TRACE/PROBE/ORBIT as applicable → distinguish facts, assumptions, unknowns and dissent → generate the linked template preview → name the qualified human decision owner → validate schema and emit a receipt → stop. No institutional determination, approval, participant contact, official-system write or external commitment.
